name: Branded Befallen
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みちび</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>かれし<ruby lang="jp"><rb>烙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>印</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect that targets 1 "Bystial" monster you control (and no other cards), or when your opponent activates a card or effect in response to the activation of your "Bystial" monster effect: You can target 1 LIGHT or DARK monster in either GY; banish it, and if you do, negate that activated effect.
eff: Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect that targets 1 "Bystial" monster you control (and no other cards), or when your opponent activates a card or effect in response to the activation of your "Bystial" monster effect: You can target 1 LIGHT or DARK monster in either GY; banish it, and if you do, negate that activated effect.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
